reviews.review_description:
This Game Reminds Me Of Subnautica, Which Is An Instant W For Me, I Cant wait for the Full Game To Come Out! 🌊🦈










[Stay Hydrated!]
it is if subnautica was on vr fav game so far
I loved it so much but its a shame the full version isnt out yet
I did like the demo. The swimming felt somewhat familiar. I like the idea of this underwater "thing".

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the feedback. We are working on the launch. Some big updates are coming in April. Keep checking!

reviews.review_title: Cool idea, I hope there's more
reviews.review_description:
This is a very short teaser. It's a pretty intriguing start, though. The swimming mechanic is nice, even a decent workout.
I hope this goes somewhere and doesn't get abandoned.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the review and rating! We're working day and night to bring out the full version to you guys. We're indie devs working on this from our own pockets, hence we tried to get a very short version out to get some feedback / traction. After getting good response, we're working full time on getting out the full version of the game which will contain about 1 hour of gameplay.

reviews.review_description: Not enough information on how to swim or directions to where your going love the graphics

developer_response.body:
Hey thanks a lot of the review and rating! 
Yes we know the tutorial or waypoint markers were not super clear. We've had this feedback from other players as well. We've worked on navigation waypoint system and also revamped the tutorial system where we teach you how to swim. They will be included in the full version of the game. Do wishlist the game, so you can play when it comes out!

reviews.review_description: I recently tried this newly released demo and was pleasantly surprised by its quality. The underwater world is beautifully crafted, and the story is both intriguing and unfolds at a captivating pace. This is definitely a full game to watch out for, as it promises a compelling narrative and engaging elements.
Loved this underwater experience. Art, sounds and swimming mechanics is perfect.

developer_response.body:
Hey lots of thanks :D
The review and rating really helps us. I hope you're excited for the full version of the game. We're working super hard on it and can't wait for all of you to try
